summary: No substantive feedback on audio or performance; reviewers expressed unrelated dissatisfaction.
review: Both reviewers offered brief comments that do not address the musical performance or recording quality of this show. One mentions singing briefly before leaving, and the other complains about a cover‑song set, providing no useful evaluation of the dead‑related material.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two reviews, both lacking detail on music or sound quality and expressing negative sentiment; insufficient data for a higher rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No commentary on set structure or pacing was given.
